name: @physics91/openrouter-mcp
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for OpenRouter API with Collective Intelligence - Multi-model consensus, ensemble reasoning, and collaborative problem solving
author: Your Name <your.email@example.com>

scripts.test:contract: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const args=['-m','pytest','tests/contracts/','-m','contract','-v']; const py=['python','python3'].find((c)=>{const r=spawnSync(c,['--version'],{stdio:'ignore'}); return !r.error && r.status===0;}); if(!py){console.error('Python executable not found (python/python3).'); process.exit(1);} const r=spawnSync(py,args,{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status);"
scripts.test:property: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const args=['-m','pytest','tests/test_property/','-m','property','-v']; const py=['python','python3'].find((c)=>{const r=spawnSync(c,['--version'],{stdio:'ignore'}); return !r.error && r.status===0;}); if(!py){console.error('Python executable not found (python/python3).'); process.exit(1);} const r=spawnSync(py,args,{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status);"
scripts.test:replay: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const args=['-m','pytest','tests/test_replay/','-m','replay','-v']; const py=['python','python3'].find((c)=>{const r=spawnSync(c,['--version'],{stdio:'ignore'}); return !r.error && r.status===0;}); if(!py){console.error('Python executable not found (python/python3).'); process.exit(1);} const r=spawnSync(py,args,{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status);"
scripts.test:assurance: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const args=['run_tests.py','assurance','-v']; const py=['python','python3'].find((c)=>{const r=spawnSync(c,['--version'],{stdio:'ignore'}); return !r.error && r.status===0;}); if(!py){console.error('Python executable not found (python/python3).'); process.exit(1);} const r=spawnSync(py,args,{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status);"
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:security
scripts.lint: cd . && python -m ruff check src/ tests/
scripts.build: echo 'Python package - no build step required'
